Okay, the question is about the 1972 election. The Democratic nominee was George McGovern. He lost to Nixon. So the answer is George McGovern. But need to confirm. Yes, 1972 election: Nixon (Republican) vs McGovern (Democrats and Republicans are major U.S. political parties. The 1972 presidential election was a key event in U.S. history. Richard Nixon was the Republican candidate who won that election. The Democratic nominee would have been the opposing candidate. From historical knowledge, the Democratic nominee in 1972 was George McGovern. He ran against Nixon and lost the election.

<answer>George McGovern</answer>
